name: Sai Sueb Delivery
original_name: สายสืบดิลิเวอรี่
overview: Pook's father is a Senior Sergeant Major in the police force and she wants to follow his path. Cholatee is the son of a mafia madam. They are bitter enemies and enjoy giving each other a good smack around.

trailers.title: สายสืบดิลิเวอรี่ t-ser
